title: Yijing Hexagram 12: Pi (Standstill)
description: Hexagram 12 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 12 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Evil people do not further the perseverance of the superior man. The great departs, the small approaches. Heaven and earth do not unite.
